allow: Bash(node -e "const ExcelJS = require\('exceljs'\); const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook\(\); const ws = wb.addWorksheet\('test'\); console.log\(typeof ws.addChart\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ws\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chart'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('image'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('draw'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const ExcelJS = require\('exceljs'\); const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook\(\); const ws = wb.addWorksheet\('test'\); console.log\(typeof ws.addImage\); console.log\(typeof wb.addImage\)")
